actors.text: A 95% CI for p (prop. of voters favoring the measure) is (0.42, 0.58). Pick the correct interpretation.
There is a 95% chance p is in (0.42, 0.58)
actors.reflection: Common but wrong. p is a fixed parameter; the interval is random. The 95% describes the METHOD's long-run capture rate, not a probability for one interval.

actors.text: We are 95% confident that this interval captures the true proportion of voters who favor the measure

actors.reflection: The CI estimates the parameter p, not the sample data. It bounds where the true proportion likely lies; it doesn't say 95% of voters voted Yes.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
